mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20d returns occur in >55% of periods when FEDFUNDS increases.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending corporate earnings declines, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE increases by >0.2 percentage points month-over-month
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses statistical significance with a p-value above 0.10 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate revenue expansion and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint positive signal yields negative 60d returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction term coefficient is statistically indistinguishable from zero in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month expansion in industrial production indicates strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side resilience, triggering positive short-term S&P 500 momentum over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal produces negative 5d returns in >55% of instances during tightening cycles, or the autocorrelation of the signal exceeds 0.8, indicating pure noise rather than predictive power.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly inflation print exceeding 0.4% forces markets to price in prolonged restrictive monetary policy, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20d returns occur in >65% of high-inflation months, or the signal predictive accuracy drops below random chance at 50% in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and rising consumer spending capacity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal yields negative 60d returns in >55% of periods, or the rolling Rank IC falls below 0.01 over consecutive 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly GDP expansion and monthly retail sales growth confirm synchronized demand across production and consumption sectors, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative 20d returns in >50% of observations, or the interaction effect is statistically insignificant with a p-value above 0.05 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply-side weakness and reduced corporate output, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 5d returns occur in >60% of contraction months, or the signal fails to achieve a Sharpe ratio above 0.5 in a long-short portfolio construction.
